mapper.select:
SELECT mr.id, mr.from_user_code, mr.to_group, mr.status, mr.create_time, mr.remark, mr.handlername, mr.handle_time FROM member_request mr
mr.status = 0
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM chat_group_member gm WHERE gm.group_code COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci = mr.to_group AND gm.user_code COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci = #{userCode} AND gm.status = 1 AND gm.role IN (1,2) )
ORDER BY mr.create_time DESC
